productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Recovery Slide Navy Blue Sandals
description: Sturdy and brightly coloured lounge footwear from adidas, you can not go wrong with these slide-ins! Upper Clima cool fabric strap at the forefoot Soft rubber footbed with cut-outs for water to drain through Printed text on the forefoot strap Branding at the heel on the footbed Plastic mesh lining under the rubber footbed Outsole Spongy rubber outsole with cuouts for water to seep through Patterned grooves Sandal care Rub surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
